mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_list ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT n.*, w.place as work_place_name FROM tb_near_miss_list n LEFT JOIN lb_work_place w ON n.work_place_id = w.id WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.deleted = 0
SELECT n.*, w.place as work_place_name FROM tb_near_miss_list n LEFT JOIN lb_work_place w ON n.work_place_id = w.id WHERE n.near_miss_id = #{nearMissId} AND n.deleted = 0

SELECT n.*, w.place as work_place_name FROM tb_near_miss_list n LEFT JOIN lb_work_place w ON n.work_place_id = w.id WHERE n.deleted = 0 ORDER BY n.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE occ_title LIKE '%' + #{occTitle} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE occ_title LIKE '%' + #{occTitle} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE work_place_id = #{workPlaceId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE work_place_id = #{workPlaceId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT n.*, w.place as work_place_name FROM tb_near_miss_list n LEFT JOIN lb_work_place w ON n.work_place_id = w.id WHERE n.incident_type = #{incidentType} AND n.deleted = 0 ORDER BY n.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE incident_type = #{incidentType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_near_miss_list WHERE near_miss_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_near_miss_list (near_miss_id, incident_type, work_place_id, occ_title, occ_title_en, occ_title_zh, occ_date, occ_site, occ_floor, occ_site_info, occ_site_x, occ_site_y, occ_image_file_id, occ_info, occ_info_en, occ_info_zh, company, author_name, author_email, author_dept, intensity, frequency, status, deleted, is_exist, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{nearMissId}, #{incidentType}, #{workPlaceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{occTitle}, #{occTitleEn}, #{occTitleZh}, #{occDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{occSite}, #{occFloor}, #{occSiteInfo}, #{occSiteX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{occSiteY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{occImageFileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{occInfo}, #{occInfoEn}, #{occInfoZh}, #{company}, #{authorName}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{intensity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{frequency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status}, #{deleted}, #{isExist}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_near_miss_list SET incident_type = #{incidentType}, work_place_id = #{workPlaceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, occ_title = #{occTitle}, occ_title_en = #{occTitleEn}, occ_title_zh = #{occTitleZh}, occ_date = #{occDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, occ_site = #{occSite}, occ_floor = #{occFloor}, occ_site_info = #{occSiteInfo}, occ_site_x = #{occSiteX,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, occ_site_y = #{occSiteY,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, occ_image_file_id = #{occImageFileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, occ_info = #{occInfo}, occ_info_en = #{occInfoEn}, occ_info_zh = #{occInfoZh}, company = #{company}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, intensity = #{intensity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, frequency = #{frequency,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status}, is_exist = #{isExist}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_near_miss_list SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
